zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham於大約1561年出生在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆時，他的父親Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge39歲，母親Elisabeth Rich33歲。他於1578年6月6日與Lady Alice Osborne在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他於1593年在英國坎布利其爾被列為member of parliament。他去世於1616年12月19日在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham于大约1561年出生在英国坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge39岁，母亲Elisabeth Rich33岁。他于1578年6月6日与Lady Alice Osborne在英国英格兰倫敦聖 迪奧尼斯 巴其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他于1593年在英国坎布利其爾被列为member of parliament。他去世于1616年12月19日在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham was born about 1561, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge, was 39 and his mother, Elisabeth Rich, was 33. He married Lady Alice Osborne on 6 June 1578, in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. In 1593, his occupation is listed as member of parliament in Cambridgeshire, England. He died on 19 December 1616, in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham est né environ 1561, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Rich, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Osborne le 6 juin 1578, à St Dionis Backchurch, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. En 1593, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1616, à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham um 1561 in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge 39 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Rich 33. Er hat am 6. Juni 1578 in St Dionis Backchurch, London, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice Osborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1593 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament in Cambridgeshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. Dezember 1616 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham è nato il circa 1561 nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Rich, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Osborne il 6 giugno 1578, nel St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1593, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament nel Cambridgeshire, England. Morì il 19 dicembre 1616, nel Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Isleham, Cambridge, England, Great Brita: イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Islehamが約1561年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridgeは39歳，母Elisabeth Richは33歳であった。1578年6月6日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ディオニス バクチャーチでLady Alice Osborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1593年，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでの職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1616年12月19日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.St Martin Ludgate, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 마틴 루드가트
ko.Saint Dionis Backchurch, London, Middles: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham(이)가 대략 1561년 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Rich(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1578년 6월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 디오니스 바ckc후르치에서 Lady Alice Osborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1593년, 그의 직업은 영국 캄브리지실르에서 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1616년 12월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.Saint Dionis Backchurch, London, Middles: St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Isleham, East Cambridgeshire, Cambridges: East Cambridgeshire, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham nasceu aproximadamente 1561, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Rich, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Osborne em 6 de junho de 1578, em St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1593, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1616, em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Martin Ludgate, London, England: ст мартинь луджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Saint Dionis Backchurch, London, Middles: ст дионис баккчурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham родился около 1561 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Rich, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Osborne 6 июня 1578 г. в местности ст дионис баккчурч, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. В 1593 году он работал по профессии member of parliament в местности камбриджешир, Англия. Он умер 19 декабря 1616 г. в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Peyton 1st Baronet Peyton of Isleham nació aproximadamente 1561, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Peyton, High Sheriff of Cambridge, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Rich, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Osborne el 6 de junio de 1578, en St Dionis Backchurch, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. En 1593, su ocupación registrada era member of parliament en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1616, en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
